bird.name: 船嘴鹭
bird.summary: 船嘴鷺（學名：Cochlearius cochlearius），又作寬嘴鷺，是鹈形目鹭科船嘴鷺屬（Cochlearius）下的唯一一种鸟类。這個物種分佈於中、南美洲的紅樹林和有水的密林中，是一種肉食性鳥類。目前其物種狀態被歸入無危。 這個物種由瑞典博物學家卡尔·林奈於其1766…

relations.subject: 船嘴鹭
relations.evidence: It lives in mangrove swamps from Mexico south to Peru and Brazil
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 船嘴鹭
relations.evidence: Boat-billed herons have a huge native range that reaches from Mexico to Peru, Brazil, and northeastern Argentina. They are nonmigratory birds that tend to live in seasonal lagoons and estuaries, and nest in mangroves. thumb|The Tuxtla Statuette, a 2nd-century AD sculpture, is carved in the form of a boat-billed heron
relations.object_summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

relations.subject: 船嘴鹭

relations.object_summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。
